blended.narrative: Mont-Sainte-Anne is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.0 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,401 ft. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.5" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
